Name: Workshop Income
Description: Income from fingerstyle guitar workshops at Dragonfly Music Center

Name: Consulting Income
Description: Public health consulting income (also tracked in Xero)

Name: Guitar Strings & Picks
Description: Guitar strings, picks, and related consumables for workshop use

Name: Sheet Music & Educational Materials
Description: Printed and digital sheet music, tablature books, and instructional materials

Name: Mileage & Transportation
Description: Mileage and gas for driving to/from Dragonfly Music Center workshops

Name: Workshop Supplies
Description: Miscellaneous supplies for running workshops (capos, tuners, stands, etc.)

Name: Chesapeake CCU Checking
Description: Primary checking account at Chesapeake Community Credit Union

Name: Accounts Receivable
Description: Outstanding student balances owed for lessons and workshops

Name: Sales Tax Payable
Description: Sales tax collected and payable (instructional services generally exempt)

Name: Retained Earnings
Description: Accumulated net income from guitar instruction side business

Name: Professional Development
Description: Online workshops and YouTube Premium subscription for guitar technique study
